title: ジャパンダートダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ooogh! The Japan Dirt Derby's here at last!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
And the racecourse's packed to the brim! Man,
there's nothin' better than runnin' in a G1!
choice_data_list: Go out there and launch some big fireworks!
Go out there and launch some big fireworks!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ya read my mind! And trust me, you're in for a
real treat!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Which classic-year racer will take the crown at the
Japan Dirt Derby? Don't go anywhere, because
we're about to find out!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: All right... Time to get this festival goin'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Oh, I know you... You're on Chief's team, right?

text_block_list.name: Oi Racer
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Good luck to us both.

text_block_list.name: Oi Racer
text_block_list.text: 'Cept, I'll be standin' on top in the end.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(Hehe, someone's ready for a scrap! I guess
everyone's cravin' to knock me down a peg.)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: You're on! I love a good fight!
